calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-11-2026 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo.

Plaintiffs/Respondents Julia Perez and Adam Dusorak appeared.
Defendant/Appellant Woodmont Real Estate Services LP and Marlene Williams, Property Manager for the Lofts at One Powell, appeared.

Plaintiff/Respondent Julia Perez and Adam Dusorak sworn and testified on their own behalf.
Defendant/Appellant Marlene Williams sworn and testified on their own behalf.

The following documentary evidence is introduced and admitted:
Plaintiff/Respondent's Group Exhibit.
Defendant/Appellant's Group Exhibit.
Appellant's and Respondent's exhibits are retained.

The matter is taken under submission.

All exhibits offered in open court returned.

Judge: Samuel K. Feng, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (305)

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Feb-11-2026 Set For Trial On Feb-11-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 305

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-11-2026 Continued To Feb-11-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
